title: Method and device for treating biomass
abstract: The invention relates to a method for treating biomass(2). Biomass (2) is fed to a pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8) by means of a feeding system (5, 7), wherein by means of the feeding system (5, 7) the biomass (2) is compressed. A filtrate is squeezed out of the biomass (2) by means of the feeding system (5, 7), in particular by a first plug screw (5) or a second plug screw (7) of the feeding system (5, 7). The biomass (2) is then thermally treated in the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8), discharged from the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8) afterwards, diluted with the filtrate before or after the discharge,and treated with an enzyme subsequently.
claims: Claims Claims 1. Method for treating biomass (2), comprising: Feeding biomass (2) to a pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8) by means of a feeding system (5, 7), wherein by means of the feeding system (5, 7) the biomass (2) is compressed, and wherein a filtrate is squeezed out of the biomass (2) by means of the feeding system (5, 7); Separating the filtrate from the biomass (2); Thermally treating the biomass (2) in the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8); Discharging the thermally treated biomass (2) from the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8); and Treating the discharged and diluted biomass (2) with an enzyme; Wherein the biomass (2) is diluted with the filtrate before or after being discharged from the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8). 2. Method according to claim 1, wherein the thermally treated biomass (2) is discharged from the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor (8) through a steam explosion. 3. Method according to claim 1, wherein the thermally treated biomass (2) is diluted before it is discharged from the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8). 4. Method according to claim 3, wherein the biomass (2) has a temperature below 100Â°C during discharging and no flashing occurs during discharging. 5. Method according to claim 3, wherein the biomass (2) has a temperature above 100Â°C during discharging and a flashing without a steam explosion occurs during discharging. 6. Method according to claim 3, wherein the biomass (2) is dewatered after the biomass (2) has been discharged from the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor (8) unit and before it is treated with the enzyme. 7. Method according to one of the preceding claims, further comprising the step of: Impregnating the biomass (2) with a reactant in an impregnation reactor unit (6) prior to feeding the impregnated biomass (2) to the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8). 8. Method according to claim 7, wherein the reactant is water, acid or a catalyst. 9. Method according to claim 7 or 8, wherein the biomass (2) is fed to the impregnation reactor unit (6) by means of a first plug screw (5) of the feeding system (5, 7), wherein the impregnation reactor unit (6) is partly filled with the reactant, and wherein the filtrate is squeezed out of the biomass (2) by means of the first plug screw (5) while the biomass (2) is fed to the impregnation reactor unit (6) by means of the first plug screw (5). 10. Method according to claim 7 or 8, wherein the filtrate is squeezed out of the impregnated biomass (2) by means of a second plug screw (7) of the feeding system (5, 7) while the impregnated biomass (2) is fed to the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8) by means of the second plug screw (7). 11. Method according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the thermally treated biomass (2) is diluted with the filtrate before the thermally treated biomass (2) is discharged from the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8). 12. Method according to one of claims 1 to 11, wherein the discharged biomass (2) is diluted with the filtrate before the discharged biomass (2) is treated with the enzyme. 13. Method according to one of claims 1 to 11, wherein the discharged biomass (2) is diluted with the filtrate while the discharged biomass (2) is treated with the enzyme. 14. Device (1) for treating biomass (2), the device (1) comprising: a feeding system (5, 7); a pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8) for thermally treating the biomass (2) and for discharging the thermally treated biomass (2); a neutralization unit (9); an impregnation reactor unit (6) for impregnating the biomass (2) with a reactant; a first plug screw (5) of the feeding system (5, 7) for compressing and feeding the biomass (2) into the impregnation reactor unit (6); and a second plug screw (7) of the feeding system (5, 7) for compressing and feeding the impregnated biomass (2) into the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8); wherein the feeding system (5, 7) is adapted for compressing and feeding the biomass (2) into the pressurized prehydrolysis reactor unit (8) and for squeezing out a filtrate out of the biomass (2), wherein the neutralization unit (9) is adapted for treating the discharged biomass (2) with an enzyme to increase a pH value of the discharged biomass (2), wherein the first plug screw (5) and/or the second plug screw (7) are adapted for squeezing out a filtrate out of the biomass (2); and wherein the device (1) is adapted for diluting the discharged biomass (2) with the squeezed out filtrate.
